task_completion.description: Verify the bookmark bar contains the required folders and no banned bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or Bookmark Manager shows exactly three folders: 'E-Bike Diagnostics', 'B2B Suppliers', and 'Service Manuals'. No bookmarks for YouTube, DoorDash, Pinkbike, or Spotify are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify browsing history and cookies are cleared for entertainment domains but preserved for B2B domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome history or site data settings show no entries for youtube.com, doordash.com, pinkbike.com, or spotify.com. Entries for qbp.com, si.shimano.com, and sram.com must still be present.

task_completion.description: Verify default and minimum font sizes are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Customize fonts' settings page shows 'Font size' set to 24 and 'Minimum font size' set to 18.

task_completion.description: Verify download directory and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads settings show the Location set to '~/Documents/Service_Manuals' (or its absolute path equivalent) and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned OFF.

task_completion.description: Verify Park Tool search engine is added with the correct keyword and URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome 'Manage search engines and site search' settings show a site search entry for 'Park Tool' with the shortcut/keyword 'park' and the URL 'https://www.parktool.com/en-us/search?q=%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage is set to Shimano SI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Appearance settings show 'Show Home button' enabled with the custom web address explicitly set to 'https://si.shimano.com', or 'On startup' settings are configured to open 'https://si.shimano.com'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make changes rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Chrome browser settings pages, bookmark manager, and history pages being actively navigated.

integrity.description: The settings applied are in the actual browser configuration, not a text editor or mock page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Chrome UI elements (address bar showing chrome://settings, chrome://bookmarks, etc.) are visible and authentic.

integrity.description: Agent did not write a Python or bash script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show scripts being executed to modify Chrome's SQLite databases (like History or Web Data) or Preferences files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Protected domains to preserve in history/cookies: qbp.com, si.shimano.com, sram.com. Banned domains to delete from history/cookies/bookmarks: youtube.com, doordash.com, pinkbike.com, spotify.com. Expected bookmark folders: 'E-Bike Diagnostics', 'B2B Suppliers', 'Service Manuals'. Font settings: Default size 24, Minimum size 18. Download directory: '~/Documents/Service_Manuals'.
